puremoe 1.0.3
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Getting Started
  • Changelog

Getting Started

Source: vignettes/getting-started.Rmd
getting-started.Rmd

puremoe provides a unified interface to PubMed and NLM data. Search with search_pubmed(), then retrieve data from any of six endpoints with get_records().

library(puremoe)
library(data.table)
library(DT)

Search

search_pubmed() accepts standard PubMed query syntax and returns a vector of PMIDs.

pmids <- puremoe::search_pubmed('("political ideology"[TiAb])')
length(pmids)
#> [1] 936
pmids_sub <- head(pmids, 50L)

Abstracts 

abstracts <- puremoe::get_records(
  pmids_sub,
  endpoint = "pubmed_abstracts",
  cores    = 1L,
  sleep    = 0.5
)

abstracts[, pmid := as.character(pmid)]
abstracts[, .(pmid, year, journal, articletitle)] |>
  DT::datatable(rownames = FALSE)

The annotations column is a list of per-article data frames containing MeSH terms, chemical names, and keywords.

data.table::rbindlist(abstracts$annotations) |>
  head(20) |>
  DT::datatable(rownames = FALSE)

Affiliations 

affiliations <- puremoe::get_records(
  head(pmids_sub, 25L),
  endpoint = "pubmed_affiliations",
  cores    = 1L,
  sleep    = 0.5
)

affiliations |>
  DT::datatable(rownames = FALSE)

iCite metrics 

icites <- puremoe::get_records(
  pmids_sub,
  endpoint = "icites",
  cores    = 1L,
  sleep    = 0.25
)

icites[, pmid := as.character(pmid)]

icites[, .(pmid, citation_count, relative_citation_ratio, nih_percentile, is_clinical)] |>
  DT::datatable(rownames = FALSE)

PubTator annotations 

pubtations <- puremoe::get_records(
  head(pmids_sub, 30L),
  endpoint = "pubtations",
  cores    = 1L
)

pubtations |>
  DT::datatable(rownames = FALSE)

References 

refs <- puremoe::get_records(
  head(pmids_sub, 15L),
  endpoint = "pubmed_references",
  cores    = 1L,
  sleep    = 0.5
)

refs[, .(pmid, cited_pmid, cited_doi, citation)] |>
  DT::datatable(rownames = FALSE)

Full text

Full-text retrieval requires open-access PMC articles. First convert PMIDs to FTP URLs, then fetch.

ftp <- puremoe::pmid_to_ftp(pmids = head(pmids_sub, 20L))

fulltext <- puremoe::get_records(
  ftp$url,
  endpoint = "pmc_fulltext",
  cores    = 1L
)

fulltext |> DT::datatable(rownames = FALSE)

Endpoint schemas

endpoint_info() returns column definitions, rate limits, and notes for any endpoint.

puremoe::endpoint_info()
#> [1] "pubmed_abstracts"    "pubmed_affiliations" "icites"             
#> [4] "pubtations"          "pmc_fulltext"
puremoe::endpoint_info("pubmed_abstracts")
#> $description
#> [1] "PubMed article metadata and abstracts"
#> 
#> $returns
#> [1] "data.frame"
#> 
#> $columns
#> $columns$pmid
#> [1] "PubMed ID (character)"
#> 
#> $columns$doi
#> [1] "Digital Object Identifier (character)"
#> 
#> $columns$year
#> [1] "Publication year (integer)"
#> 
#> $columns$pubtype
#> [1] "Publication type(s) (character)"
#> 
#> $columns$journal
#> [1] "Journal name (character)"
#> 
#> $columns$articletitle
#> [1] "Article title (character)"
#> 
#> $columns$abstract
#> [1] "Abstract text (character)"
#> 
#> $columns$annotations
#> [1] "MeSH terms and keywords (list-column)"
#> 
#> 
#> $parameters
#> $parameters$cores
#> [1] "parallel workers"
#> 
#> $parameters$sleep
#> [1] "delay between requests (seconds)"
#> 
#> 
#> $rate_limit
#> [1] "NCBI E-utilities: 3/sec without key, 10/sec with key"
#> 
#> $notes
#> [1] "Use ncbi_key for higher rate limits. Primary source of article metadata."

Developed by Jason Timm.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
